title: Chapter 46
content:
Once again, too many comments at once. I might not be able to check them all now, but I will do so sometime in the future. If there is a question in there somewhere, then I hope the already reading viewers could answer them.

~~

Chapter 46

"Mmph!"

"Mmph!"

"Mmmm~~~"

A week had passed since we came to live in the forest. We made significant progress in this one week. The basic stamina training was done. Up next was the basic strength and agility training. Of course, the fam was all ready for that. They were diligent, if anything other than that.

"Uuamph!"

Sure, their talent was holding them down, but their hard work was something to be admired. Especially Lucas. Although he was grumpy, his hard work was beyond all of the others combined. His talent was good compared to the rest of the family, and with the factor of hard work involved, he was already on the verge of entering the second star aura realm.

"Mmm~~"

"Muumm~~~"

Other than that, Rayla made the most significant progress. She jumped from a second circle mana stage to a third circle mana stage. Of course, the concept of circles was limited to only S rank, which was seven circles, so from her point, she was making a stark progress.

That was another point I had discovered. There was nothing beyond S rank here. No SS, SSS, or transcendent, the last realm of a strength in ht power ladder. Everything ended at the seventh circle or seventh star, otherwise more commonly known as S rank.

"Mmph!"

"Myaamm~~~"

Other than that, Sandra had solidified her second star and was preparing to enter the third star realm. Julian was still a second star, and his talent was a very big drawback as well, so he was still only a second-star aura master, and there had been very little progress.

As for Martha, well, she was similar to Julian in terms of talent as well. Her progress in terms of strength had been only a little as well, but a lot more than Julian's, if I have to say. She may still be a first star, but she would soon be entering the second star realm.

Most of it had to do with me. In other words, although she was untalented when it came to raising her strength, she was talented in another aspect, and that was...

"Ugh!!"

Gulp!

Gulp!

Gulp!

Strong gulps as Martha swallowed all the semen I let out into her tiny mouth. She wouldn't miss a drop, let alone choke on it. I had had a taste of the best of sluts who could swallow a man whole and not even spit bones out yet Martha was a girl who had been unfamiliar to blowjobs since a week ago yet the way she sucked me off was better than those sluts who had been in their profession for decades.

That was her true talent. Even Rayla and Sandra were left far behind when it came to Martha. And not just blowjob, but even handjobs and sex in various positions only needed to be shown once to her but she wouldn't need me to show them to her again.

As I said before, that was how much of a talent she was when it came to sex. And not just that, as much as she was talented, she was insatiable as well.

She stood up after she had swallowed every bit of my cum and turned her back to me me while taking off her pants in one swift, bending down a little to show me her pink holes as she remained bent and used her fingers to part her pink lips and showed me the insides of her pink heaven, "Now shall we get to it, brother?"

She really was insatiable. I couldn't describe in words how wet she was. All I could say was that as soon as I stood up, I lined up my dick on her narrow pussy hole that was as still as tight as the first day, and rammed into her in one go.

"Aahngg!!!"

"Uummmhh~~~"

Slick...

Slick...

Squeeze...

She was slick and wet; so much so that it only took one deep thrust, despite how tight she was, to enter her fully and lodge myself deep inside of her until only the last two inches or so were out.

She was tiny, no doubt about that. She was still maturing so I had no doubt that given her wide hips, she would follow in the footsteps of her mother and elder sister, developing a pussy that would be able to devour my full length.

I wasn't too optimistic about the chest department, though, but I had a few tricks for that as well. But natural type was always better than a fake, so I was never a fan of such sort of things. I believed strictly in natural flavors, after all.

As a wise man once said: 'Big or small, every hole is a goal.'

If there were humongous chests, there was an attraction to small chests as well. Of course, an ass had to be at least a handful big. Fully skinny asses weren't attractive at all. My opinion, strictly though.

Pump!

Pah!

I slapped her jiggling tight ass that shook with each movement from my waist. In just a week, after I had ejaculated in her several times, she was on the verge of a breakthrough that would have taken her at least a few months, even with the strongest of the aura cultivation techniques.

Since that was the case, I kept things strictly vaginal, not just for Martha but for the other girls as well. That was also why the females in the fam grew stronger faster than the men. I came inside them every chance I could get.

I didn't even waste any time with foreplays or such but when it came to Martha, I couldn't just say no to her blowjobs so I had to make an exception. Besides, she was strangely fond of blowjobs.

But it wasn't as fast as I thought it was. Perhaps Sandra was already on the verge of breaking through to the second star when I came twice inside of her and got her to break through to the next stage. However, now, even with all the resources, aura cultivation technique, exercises, and sex, she had barely managed to reach the solidification stage.

Well, that was due to her talent as well.

"Ugh!"

"Annnhhh~~~"

Once again, we both came together. It was like Martha had a strict control of her pussy and only came when she wanted to, unlike her sister or mother who would have a great time holding back their orgasms.

"Haa... Haa..."

"As expected... Haa... Finishing together... is the best..." Martha said in between her deep breaths as we washed off our orgasms. Counting this one, I had come inside of her seven times now. Seven times plus one blowjob equaled eight time.

Eight times in twenty minutes was a record, if I had to say. Though I didn't like the fact of being called a quick shot even though it was intentional.

[State of completion has ended]

My dick returned to its abnormal state and the pleasure nerves disappeared so I stopped feeling anything altogether. It was depressing, to say the least, but perhaps it was all the more motivation for me to move forward now.

It was time to head deeper into the forest.

"Are you mad?!" When I proposed the idea of going deeper into the forest while I played with Rayla pussy, making her moan and writhe in pleasure, Julian yelled at me in anger. Not because I was fingering her wife in front of him and all of his family, but because I had proposed entering the deeper parts of the forest.

Normal, right?

Anyway, I could understand his psyche. They had always hunted in the outer territories, where there were hardly any D rank monsters. Going deeper would mean that the D rank monsters would be the norm, and there might even be C or even a B rank monster there. Or a tier five monster, as they called it.

Anyway, to them, entering deeper was nothing short of a death sentence.

"But we need to grow stronger. And once we return, we would be able to make enough wealth to live comfortably if we managed to hunt a tier five monster." I argued.

"Or we could die," Julian argued with only one point.

"We need to grow stronger, Father. How long do you intend for us to live in that house? We can make enough money to start a business and move to a merchant's district. Not to mention, we would gain power that is the sole backbone of this world." I tried my best to urge him to reconsider.

It wasn't like he wasn't aware of these facts either. Our living conditions were far from the best, and even if we worked ourselves to the bone in the outer area, the most we would be able to make was a sum of only ten thousand gold.

Ten gold bricks, only. A hundred bricks were needed to purchase the title of a noble. Nobility had many advantages.

If we managed to hunt in the deeper sections, we would be able to purchase a title of nobility and make ourselves eligible to use various authorities of the kingdom.

"..." Julian remained silent. They all did. They exchanged glances with each other, and finally, the person whom I was expecting the least to encourage me in my insane plan, finally spoke up...

"I think we should do it, husband." Rayla said as she looked at her husband, "We have trusted Jack so far, and not once have we been wronged. I believe our child wouldn't make a suggestion without a reason. I think we should have faith in him and do it."

~~

Okay, so I'am having some trouble with Martha's art. It's not turning out to be what I want. If you want, I can share the experimental renders and you can share what you think. Let me know.

And also if there are any errors, you know what to do.
